title: General Seasonal ARIMA Model Structure & Decision Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the components, notation, and iterative modeling process for a general multiplicative Seasonal ARIMA (SARIMA) model.
relationships: Start with a non-stationary Input Time Series, apply d and D orders of differencing to achieve stationarity, combine non-seasonal (p,d,q) and seasonal (P,D,Q)s components to form the full Model, then pass the model to Residual Analysis; if residuals are not white noise, return to adjust component orders
